rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NICHOLAS HOVLAND 2015 SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/2021. Same issue no filed response. Issues: 1) The account alleges the ending balance in First Republic Bank #4053 on 3/31/2020 was $133,425.71. The provided bank statement ends 03/31/2019 (1 year earlier). Please file bank statements that verify the balance at the end of the account period 3/31/2020. The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. [LRSF 14.35 D.]

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/2021. rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF KAZUKO MIYAMOTO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) The Washington Street property has not been inventoried and accounted for as an asset of this temporary conservatorship, even though the temporary conservator executed the deed to transfer title to the property to the trustee; 2) The temporary conservator executed the trust and trust transfer deed without obtaining amended temporary letters including Probate Code section 2580 relief as additional powers; and 3) The temporary conservator's attorneys request fees and costs in the total amount of $58,811.13. The temporary conservator and her attorneys request the imposition of a lien on the Washington Street property to secure their fees and costs with 5% simple interest. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARMINE MAKASDIJAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/27/2021 Issues: 1) Notwithstanding the waiver of account, if the petition and report requests statutory commissions or fees based on any amount other than the amount of the Inventory and Appraisal, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. [CRC 7.705]. 2) Please list the names and last known address of all vested or contingent beneficaries of the trust so the court can determine if they received proper notice. [CRC 7.902]. 3) The petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed to each distributee, including the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) to be distributed to each beneficiary. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6) a.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/12/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN COUCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/2021. 1) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] 2) Please indicate John Cherry's date of death. 3) Will is not self-proving under Prob. Code, 8220(b) and CCP 2015.5. Petitioner must prove the Will. 4) A proposed nonresident personal representative will be required to post a bond to protect California creditors, even if the will waives, or all beneficiaries waive, bond. A declaration or attachment to the petition setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate will be used by the Court to determine the amount of the bond, but in no event will the bond be less than $20,000. [LRSF 14.16 F.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/19/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.
